steps.title: Apply the rearrangement from the given condition
steps.content: Move the $(4-7x)$ terms to one side: $9-5=8(4-7x)-9(4-7x)$, giving $4=-(4-7x)$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The question asks for the value of $4-7x$, not for $x$ itself. Therefore the value to enter is -4.
